feedback: The dashboard takes too long to load when filtering reports by region.
The onboarding checklist is confusing for new admins and we had to contact support twice.
The app crashes whenever I try to upload a profile photo.
Search results are very slow and sometimes show old data.
We need bulk invoice export for finance review at the end of each month.
Please add a native HubSpot integration so we do not have to use Zapier.
The settings page is hard to understand and important controls are buried.
Role permissions are too limited for our regional managers.
I love the new layout, but notifications arrive late.
Export fails with an unknown error when the report has more than 500 rows.
Support response was helpful, but the help center article was outdated.
The weekly report needs a comparison against the previous month.
The pricing page does not explain what is included in the Growth plan.
The Salesforce sync disconnects every few days and creates duplicate records.
It is difficult to find saved items after the latest update.
The dashboard freezes when I switch between saved filters during a live review.
Charts are useful, but I need clearer labels for weekly trend changes.
The dashboard should let me pin my most important metrics at the top.
The first setup screen has too many choices and new teammates get stuck.
We need a progress indicator during onboarding so admins know what is left.
The invite team step fails silently when an email address has a typo.
The mobile app logs me out every morning even though remember me is enabled.
Push notifications open the wrong screen after I tap them.
The mobile layout cuts off long project names on smaller phones.
Large reports take more than a minute to generate during peak hours.
Search is fast for recent records but slow for older customer history.
The app becomes sluggish after I leave several tabs open all day.
Invoice downloads should include the subscription ID and tax details.
The billing history page does not show who changed the plan.
We need purchase order support before finance can approve renewal.
The Slack integration sends duplicate alerts for the same event.
Please add Microsoft Teams notifications for enterprise customers.
The Jira sync misses comments added after the first issue push.
The filter menu closes too quickly when selecting multiple options.
Empty states should explain what action to take next.
The table columns are hard to resize and saved widths do not persist.
Admins need a way to preview what each role can see.
Read-only users can still access export controls, which is confusing.
We need separate permissions for billing settings and product settings.
CSV upload fails when the file has quoted line breaks in feedback text.
The date filter sometimes includes one extra day outside the selected range.
Bulk archive marks some records as archived but leaves them visible.
The support team solved my issue, but it took three handoffs.
Live chat should show the expected wait time before we start a conversation.
The help center search returns too many unrelated articles.
Scheduled reports should allow different recipients per department.
The PDF report needs the same filters as the web dashboard.
Trend reports should call out sudden spikes automatically.
The pricing tiers are hard to compare without a feature matrix.
Usage overage warnings arrive too late for us to control spend.
We need a sandbox environment included in the Enterprise plan.
